source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Design the primary driver-cell monocoque and roll-cage structure of a Challenger-class cross-country solar-EV benchmark targeting the 6 m^2 silicon array sub-class as a multi-part assembly. The assembly consists of the 4130 chromoly tubular main hoop / roll cage, the CFRP sandwich driver-cell floor, the CFRP sandwich front bulkhead panel, the CFRP sandwich side-intrusion panels (left + right), the aluminum honeycomb core between the skins, the roof solar array mounting frame carrying the 6 m^2 array, the 5-point harness anchor brackets (5 anchors), and the steel cage-to-monocoque attachment fittings. Vehicle overall length must not exceed 5 m, width must not exceed 2.2 m, height must not exceed 1.8 m per road-law annex. Total vehicle mass excluding driver must not exceed 500 kg. The solar array footprint must be <= 6.0 m^2 projected horizontal area of silicon cells. Roll cage material: 4130 chromoly steel tubing (Young's modulus 205 GPa, Poisson 0.29, yield 435 MPa, ultimate 670 MPa, density 7850 kg/m^3), minimum outer diameter 31.75 mm x wall 1.65 mm. Driver cell monocoque is carbon/epoxy sandwich with quasi-isotropic 1.5 mm CFRP skins (E = 55 GPa, strength 600 MPa), 20 mm aluminum honeycomb core (E3 = 0.8 GPa, shear strength 1.2 MPa, density 50 kg/m^3). Load cases (cross-country solar-EV structural inheritance): (LC1) main hoop vertical 6 kN + lateral 5 kN + longitudinal 9 kN simultaneously at the top of the hoop with base fixed; (LC2) front bulkhead: 6000 N axial applied at the bulkhead centerline representing front-impact equivalent load; (LC3) side intrusion: 7000 N normal to the side-impact structure at mid-height; (LC4) harness/belt anchor: 13,500 N at each of the 5-point harness anchors per FIA 8854/98-equivalent at the most adverse angle; (LC5) roof solar array downforce + aerodynamic lift: aero lift 800 N uniformly distributed over the 6 m^2 array footprint at 100 km/h race speed. Pass/fail: (R1) no tube or laminate element exceeds yield/first-ply-failure across LC1-LC4 (435 MPa steel, 600 MPa CFRP), (R2) deflection of main hoop top toward helmet under LC1 below 50 mm, (R3) CFRP skin strain under LC5 below 0.4%, (R4) core shear below 0.8 MPa under LC5, (R5) first global torsional mode above 10 Hz. Verification is performed on the assembled steel-cage + CFRP-monocoque + honeycomb-core multi-body model with representative bolted / bonded interface stiffness; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Deliverables: STEP with all bodies, layup table, FEA per case on assembly, modal report, and full mass budget separating cage / skin / core / array.
short_prompt:
Design the primary driver-cell monocoque and roll-cage structure of a Challenger-class cross-country solar-EV targeting the 6 m^2 silicon array sub-class, as a multi-part assembly.

Envelope: length <= 5 m, width <= 2.2 m, height <= 1.8 m. Total vehicle mass excluding driver <= 500 kg. Solar array footprint <= 6.0 m^2 projected. Roll cage 4130 chromoly tubing (E 205 GPa, Poisson 0.29, yield 435 MPa, ultimate 670 MPa, density 7850 kg/m^3) at minimum OD 31.75 mm x wall 1.65 mm. Driver cell is carbon/epoxy sandwich with quasi-isotropic 1.5 mm CFRP skins (E 55 GPa, strength 600 MPa) over 20 mm aluminum honeycomb core (E3 0.8 GPa, shear 1.2 MPa, density 50 kg/m^3).

Load cases.
- LC1 main hoop: 6 kN vertical + 5 kN lateral + 9 kN longitudinal simultaneously at top of hoop.
- LC2 front bulkhead: 6000 N axial at bulkhead centerline.
- LC3 side intrusion: 7000 N normal at mid-height.
- LC4 harness: 13,500 N at each of 5 anchors per FIA 8854/98-equivalent.
- LC5 roof array aero lift: 800 N over 6 m^2 footprint at 100 km/h.

CFRP skin strain under LC5 < 0.4%; core shear < 0.8 MPa; first torsional mode > 10 Hz.

prompt.title: Challenger-class solar EV monocoque + roll cage (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Challenger-class 6 m^2 solar EV: chromoly roll cage + CFRP floor + front bulkhead + side-intrusion panels + honeycomb core + roof array mount + 5 harness anchors + cage attachment fittings.

parts.name: roll_cage_tube
parts.role: 4130 chromoly main hoop and cage members forming the driver head-protection envelope

parts.name: driver_cell_floor_panel
parts.role: CFRP sandwich floor panel of the monocoque
parts.material_hint: CFRP QI skin + Al honeycomb core

parts.name: front_bulkhead_panel
parts.role: CFRP sandwich panel at the front bulkhead reacting LC2 axial
parts.material_hint: CFRP QI skin + Al honeycomb core

parts.name: side_intrusion_panel
parts.role: left / right side-intrusion structure panel reacting LC3 lateral load
parts.material_hint: CFRP QI skin + Al honeycomb core

parts.name: honeycomb_core
parts.role: 20 mm aluminum honeycomb core bonded between sandwich skins

parts.name: roof_array_mount_frame
parts.role: frame carrying the 6 m^2 silicon solar array on the roof

parts.name: harness_anchor_bracket
parts.role: bracket at each of the five 5-point-harness anchors

parts.name: cage_to_monocoque_fitting
parts.role: fitting tying steel cage to CFRP monocoque through a bonded / bolted interface

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: X forward along vehicle longitudinal, Y transverse, Z up

boundary_conditions.interfaces: roll cage welded internally and bolted/bonded to CFRP monocoque via steel fittings; honeycomb core adhesively bonded between skins; harness anchor brackets bolted/welded to cage; roof array frame bolted to cage
boundary_conditions.support: hoop base mounts fixed in LC1; monocoque attachment points fixed in LC2 and LC3

prompt.objective: minimize total mass while meeting all triaxial, harness, aero, and modal gates

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

interfaces.load_path: cage tube welded to attachment fitting
floor panel bonded / bolted to attachment fitting
floor skin bonded to honeycomb core
front bulkhead bonded / bolted to floor panel
side intrusion panel bonded / bolted to floor panel
harness anchor bracket welded / bolted to cage
roof array frame bolted to cage

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: Challenger-class solar EVs combine a welded steel roll cage with a CFRP sandwich monocoque bonded across multiple panels; triaxial hoop loads, front bulkhead, side intrusion, harness, and roof array loads each react across a different interface of this assembly.
notes.speculation_caveats: Panel count, cage topology, and fitting count are speculative; materials, loads, and thresholds inherit the original sample verbatim.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
